evals.prompt: Create a new Python project named `acme-service` using uv with Python 3.11. Package should be `acme`, no framework. Include git init, .gitignore, .env/.env.example, README, AGENTS.md, workflows folder, agents/skills folder, pyproject with ruff/ty/pytest. Show the next commands to run.
evals.expected_output: Project scaffold with uv+git init, env/ignore files, docs, src/acme package, tests, agents/skills + workflows folders, pyproject configured with ruff/ty/pytest, plus usage notes.

assertions.name: git_initialized
assertions.text: Output mentions git init or indicates repo initialized.

assertions.name: pyproject_tools
assertions.text: pyproject lists ruff, ty, pytest, python-dotenv (dev/optional).

assertions.name: env_files
assertions.text: Creates both .env and .env.example with guidance and no secrets.

assertions.name: agents_workflows_dirs
assertions.text: Creates agents/skills/ and workflows/ with brief README or note.

assertions.name: package_layout
assertions.text: Creates src/acme with __init__.py and __main__.py plus tests/test_smoke.py.

evals.prompt: Initialize a FastAPI-based project named `notifier-api` (package `notifier`) using uv and Python 3.12. Add FastAPI and uvicorn dependencies, include git, .gitignore, env files, README/AGENTS, workflows folder, agents/skills folder, pyproject with ruff/ty/pytest and FastAPI config. Add a minimal FastAPI app stub and document run command.
evals.expected_output: Scaffolded uv project with FastAPI deps, FastAPI app stub, uvicorn run instructions, standard files/folders, tooling configured.

assertions.name: fastapi_deps
assertions.text: pyproject adds fastapi and uvicorn (standard extras).

assertions.name: fastapi_stub
assertions.text: Creates src/notifier/app.py (or similar) with FastAPI app and health route.

assertions.name: run_command
assertions.text: README documents uvicorn run command using uv run.

assertions.name: tooling_present
assertions.text: ruff, ty, pytest, python-dotenv included in deps and configured.

assertions.name: structure_complete
assertions.text: Env files, git init, agents/skills, workflows, tests present.

evals.prompt: Set up a CLI-oriented project `data-tools` (package `datatools`) with Typer on Python 3.10 using uv. Include git init, .gitignore, env files, README/AGENTS, workflows, agents/skills, pyproject with ruff/ty/pytest and Typer. Add a simple Typer CLI entrypoint and smoke test.
evals.expected_output: uv project with Typer CLI stub, smoke test, standard scaffolding, tooling deps added.

assertions.name: typer_dep
assertions.text: pyproject includes typer (and rich/click if desired via typer).

assertions.name: cli_stub
assertions.text: Creates Typer CLI entrypoint (e.g., src/datatools/cli.py) wired in __main__.py.

assertions.name: scaffolding_complete
assertions.text: git init, env files, agents/skills, workflows, README/AGENTS present; pyproject contains ruff, ty, pytest, python-dotenv.

assertions.name: commands_listed
assertions.text: README shows uv sync, uv run cli invocation, uv run pytest.
